title: GMX - Rekt
relevance_summary: Cross-contract reentrancy exploit using GLP token manipulation

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls executeDecreaseOrder() with an arbitrary contract address as input.
prevention.trigger: executeDecreaseOrder() with arbitrary contract address input

red_flags: Arbitrary contract address input in executeDecreaseOrder()
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls executeDecreaseOrder() with an arbitrary contract address as input.
summary: GMX lost $42 million due to a reentrancy exploit where the attacker manipulated GLP token pricing by exploiting the arbitrary contract address input in the executeDecreaseOrder() function.
